fields.label: Ownership Type
fields.options:
JV
Managed Franchise
Full Franchise
Company Owned
fields.description: S231 D-3-2: matches Company.store_ownership_type. Schedule lookup is keyed by (ownership_type, fee_type).

fields.label: Fee Type
fields.description: S231 D-3-2: maps to BEI Billing Schedule fields royalty_fee / marketing_fee / management_fee / ecommerce_fee.

fields.label: Rate (decimal)
fields.description: S231 D-3-2: decimal rate (e.g. 0.07 for 7% royalty). Per-store overrides go in BEI Fee Carveout, not here.

fields.label: Base Field
fields.description: S231 D-3-2: which BEI Billing Schedule field the rate multiplies. E-com MUST be `website_sales` (NOT `online_sales` which includes FoodPanda/Grab). Per CEO 2026-05-02.

fields.label: Recipient Company
fields.description: S231 D-3-2 + D-4: SI.company target. JV fees → Bebang Enterprise Inc. (BEI). MF/FF fees → BEBANG FRANCHISE CORP. (BFC, collected by BEI as agent during interim).

fields.label: Applies To (free-form)
fields.description: Optional human-readable scope (e.g. "All MF stores 2026-05-onward"). Not consumed by code.

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Optional context (contract section reference, change reason, etc.).
